description_long: This is a medium-sized, round terracotta plant pot with a wide, thick rim and a gently tapering body. The exterior surface is textured and displays a weathered, reddish-brown coloration with subtle pinkish hues, suggesting exposure to outdoor elements. A decorative raised motif resembling a stylized floral or scroll pattern is present on one side, adding a touch of classical ornamentation. The pot's surface shows natural imperfections and slight discoloration, enhancing its rustic, aged appearance. The interior is unglazed and appears rough, consistent with traditional clay pots. The overall form is sturdy and functional, suitable for supporting a variety of plants in urban outdoor settings.
description: A weathered, reddish-brown terracotta plant pot with a thick rim and decorative raised motif, featuring a rustic, textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick rim and a partial view of the decorative motif on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view with the decorative motif fully visible on the left, highlighting the pot's tapering shape.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the motif on the right and the pot's rounded, robust form.
description_view_3: Angled view with the decorative motif on the left, showing more of the pot's weathered surface and coloration.
attribute_placement_context: commonly placed in residential gardens or on urban sidewalks for decorative planting
